message:
docs(connectors): harmonize implementation guide with round 2 spec

Updates Rust connector guide to match FCP V2 spec refinements:

- derive_sender_subkey: added sender_instance_id parameter and HKDF info
- ZoneRekeyPolicy: replaced ZoneRatchetPolicy, added rewrap_on_membership_change
- MeshSessionHello/Ack: added nonce fields and updated transcript comments
- Session key derivation: nonces now included in HKDF info string
- ApprovalToken: header replaces token_id, added Execution scope variant
- ApprovalScope::Execution: verify method handles new scope
- ConnectorFormat: WASI recommended for high-risk, added runtime requirements
- SimulateRequest/Response: new preflight check structs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
